action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 achieved MAE 0.1124 with a simple dense SchNet (512 hidden, 6 interactions, 50 epochs, batch_size=128). Training is fast (~30s/epoch) and stable with pure PyTorch. The model is still slowly improving at epoch 50, and the train-val gap is small (0.100 vs 0.114), suggesting longer training and architectural improvements will help without overfitting. Analysis: To push toward SOTA (0.03-0.06 eV), I will improve the architecture with learnable RBF widths, gated continuous filters, pre/post LayerNorm, atom-wise layers between interactions, and a sum+mean readout. I will also scale batch size to 512 for faster training and train for up to 100 epochs with early stopping (patience=20). Decision: Rewrite model.py and train.py with these improvements. Keep predict.py compatible. Train for 100 epochs and submit eval.
